metadata.description: Doruk's AI coding harness for Claude Code — a from-scratch, human-gated, multi-model workflow (discuss -> align -> ship), backed by a committed .doruk/ state & memory layer and cross-model delegation in isolated git worktrees.

plugins.name: doruk-ai-harness
plugins.description: 11 skills across three category dirs — workflow (discuss, align, ship: the headline pipeline), state-memory (handoff, feature-organize, wrap), and delegation (codex-feedback-planning, codex-task-delegator, gemini-delegate, worktree-init, worktree-lifecycle). Every leaf is declared in the plugin's skills[] manifest, so /plugin install loads all 11 natively even though they live under category subdirs (skills/<block>/<name>/). install.sh stays as an offline / non-Claude-Code fallback that flattens every leaf into ~/.claude/skills/.
